channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: The X app for iOS now has a built-in video editor
item.description: X now has a built-in video editor on iOS.

item.title: How to watch Switzerland vs Colombia: Free Streams, TV Channels & Kick-Off time for FIFA World Cup 2026 last-16 clash in Vancouver
item.description: Here's how to watch Switzerland vs Colombia for free online and from anywhere at the FIFA World Cup 2026, as the two sides battle for a quarter-final place.

item.title: This Nothing book laptop concept is the coolest notebook you will see in 2026 — even if it does remind me of another great device
item.description: A concept artist has a created an attractive notebook render for a potential Nothing book laptop, but the chances of a notebook from the UK smartphone company are minimal.

item.title: A 'small form factor dream': The Minisforum MS-01 tackles big workloads, and it's $544 off at Newegg right now
item.description: Powered by Intel's Core i9-13900H, the barebone Minisforum MS-01 lets you build a compact workstation your way, and it's on sale for just $655 at Newegg.

item.title: Hacked, leaked, and held for ransom: The worst breaches of 2026 so far
item.description: From a massive DOGE data breach and the hacking of critical energy and water systems to the hack of an FBI surveillance system, here are the most damaging security incidents and data breaches of 2026.

item.title: Avatar Aang: The Last Airbender finally has a trailer and a July 25 release date
item.description: If you want to (legally) watch Avatar Aang: The Last Airbender, it finally has a trailer and a July 25 release date.

item.title: The AI architecture that let Liberty Mutual shrug off the Fable 5 outage
item.description: When Anthropic's Fable 5 was pulled from international use for nearly three weeks, some over-reliant businesses were left scrambling.But Liberty Mutual easily pivoted to other platforms. That’s because 18 months earlier, they built their "AI backbone" exactly for this kind of scenario.In this rapidly moving AI landscape, the 114-year-old property and casualty insurance company recognized independence as an operating advantage.“Things are changing so fast, you need a backbone that's flexible,” Brian Craig, Liberty Mutual’s senior director of architecture, said at a recent VB Impact event. “You ...

item.title: 'We want an experience that is close to a pen-and-paper RPG' — The Blood of Dawnwalker director says the game's big choices will offer more player freedom and 'boost immersion'
item.description: The Blood of Dawnwalker director, Konrad Tomaszkiewicz, wants the game to feel like a "pen-and-paper RPG" that provides an immersive experience.

item.title: Claude Cowork expands to mobile and web
item.description: With this update, users can start a task from their desk, get status updates on their phone, and pick up the finished output later — even if their laptop is closed.

item.title: 'Next time, maybe the screws can be outside?': Fairphone pokes fun at the Nothing Phone (4b) for its faux repairable design
item.description: The Nothing Phone (4b) has a screw-laden design, but as Fairphone points out, it's all for show.

item.title: Box survey: Why enterprise AI leaders are outperforming their peers
item.description: Presented by Box Content access, governance, and platform flexibility are emerging as the dividing lines between AI leaders and laggards, according to the new State of AI in the enterprise report from Box, which surveyed 1,640 IT decision makers across the US, UK, France, and Japan. One of the report's major findings is the speed of the shift: the combined share of organizations describing themselves as advanced or leading edge soared from 8% to 64% just over the past year, while the share calling themselves early stage or not yet started collapsed from 53% to just 9%. Eighty percent of organi...

item.title: I used this free tool to see every road collision near my home over the past 25 years — and it’s helped me plot safe walking routes for my kids
item.description: Want to avoid dangerous roads? This free map shows where crashes happen most.

item.title: Le jeu compétitif est à l’honneur avec cet écran PC Asus Full HD 310 Hz de 24,5″ soldé à -34% sur Amazon
item.description: L'Asus ROG Strix XG259CMS est un écran PC orienté gaming, mais pas n'importe lequel : la compétition, l'eSport. Un modèle qui passe de 349 euros à 229 euros pendant les Soldes sur Amazon.

item.title: Pas de fuite et zéro entretien : vanRaam invente une suspension de vélo sans huile pour ses tricycles électriques
item.description: Le fabricant néerlandais de tricycles électriques vanRaam dévoile BiSSA, une suspension sans huile qu’il compte généraliser sur toute sa gamme. Une petite révolution mécanique pour des vélos pensés avant tout pour les personnes âgées ou en situation de handicap.

item.title: New Zealand denies VPN restrictions following fierce privacy backlash
item.description: Following controversial reports that New Zealand could restrict Virtual Private Networks to enforce an under-16 social media ban, the government has swiftly rejected the idea, reassuring users that their privacy tools are safe.

item.title: Polestar 4 SUV : la fameuse voiture électrique sans lunette arrière récupère… une lunette arrière
item.description: La Polestar 4, cette curieuse voiture électrique dénuée de vitre arrière, va bientôt se dédoubler avec une nouvelle version : la Polestar 4 SUV. La marque sino-suédoise commence à dévoiler quelques détails de cette version plus pratique.

item.title: Doom developer id reportedly cut in half as part of Xbox layoffs
item.description: As part of the mass layoffs hitting Xbox, Doom developer id Software has laid off around 50 percent of its staff, according to Game Developer. One source claimed to the publication that the cuts equate to more than 90 redundancies. Another source said that id's QA department was significantly impacted. The report was published the […]

item.title: Samsung says it will launch a floating data center by 2028 as it looks to jump on 'a major new opportunity'
item.description: Forget space-bound data centers – Samsung has plans to float its data centers on the water by as soon as 2028.

item.title: How to watch Auger-Aliassime vs. Djokovic online for free
item.description: How to watch Wimbledon for free. Live stream Auger-Aliassime vs. Djokovic in Wimbledon 2026 for free from anywhere in the world.

item.title: Enter the Mashable Big Guessing Game to win a new Apple Watch
item.description: Mashable is hosting a contest asking you to predict what Apple will do in 2026. Every correct guess earns you additional chances to win the grand prize of a new Apple Watch.

item.title: I'm a tech expert, and believe me: your next laptop’s battery life is about more than just battery size
item.description: When buying a new laptop, you want to make sure it offers good battery life, but that doesn't just mean looking at capacity and manufacturers' claims. Here's what you really need to consider...

item.title: Want a cheap Shark fan this summer? Amazon just knocked up to $70 off top-rated models — and these are my 3 expert picks
item.description: Enjoy a cooling breeze with a super-fine mist of water to keep you feeling refreshed this summer.

item.title: Shut Those Laptops! Anthropic Puts Its Claude Cowork Agent on Your Phone
item.description: Claude Cowork now keeps working on tasks even after you close your laptop. It’s part of a larger push toward smartphone-controlled agents.

item.title: After 4 hours, The Blood of Dawnwalker feels like a true Witcher 3 successor
item.description: The Blood of Dawnwalker's opening four hours show some impressive ambitions for the debut RPG from Rebel Wolves — and I've been left excited to play more.

item.title: 'Clair Obscur showed that you can take a genre and do it in a different and interesting way' — The Blood of Dawnwalker director says the ambitious game was made out of a 'love for RPGs'
item.description: The Blood of Dawnwalker director says the ambitious game was made out of a "love for RPGs" and a drive to make something unique.

item.title: The Blood of Dawnwalker director says without previous experience from The Witcher 3: Wild Hunt and Cyberpunk 2077 'it wouldn't be possible to create a game like this'
item.description: The Blood of Dawnwalker might not exist if not for the experienced developers at Rebel Wolves who worked on The Witcher 3: Wild Hunt and Cyberpunk 2077.

item.title: 'The world is living and it's not waiting for you' — The Blood of Dawnwalker director says the RPG's 30-day timer gives the story a 'sense of urgency' and 'emotional impact'
item.description: The Blood of Dawnwalker director, Konrad Tomaszkiewicz, wants players to feel driven by a "sense of urgency" with the RPG's unconventional 30-day timer.

item.title: 'We said it's expensive as hell, but we thought it's worth it, because it's unique and different' — The Blood of Dawnwalker director says the RPG's day and night system with its human and vampire gameplay loops is 'almost two different games'
item.description: Rebel Wolves knew The Blood of Dawnwalker's day and night system was going to be challenging, but wanted to deliver a "unique" experience for players.

item.title: Now you can direct Anthropic's Claude Cowork AI from your phone
item.description: Max subscribers get first access to Claude's new Cowork tool for your phone.

item.title: Anthropic brings Claude Cowork to mobile and web as usage data shows most users aren’t coding
item.description: Anthropic on Tuesday launched Claude Cowork on mobile and web, expanding a tool that has quietly become the company's bridge between the developer-centric world of AI coding agents and the far larger market of knowledge workers who never open a terminal.The rollout, which begins in beta with Max subscribers before expanding to additional plans, marks a strategic inflection for Anthropic. It transforms Cowork from a desktop-only agent into a cross-device platform where tasks can start on a laptop, continue autonomously in the background, and be reviewed from a phone — even after the user closes...

item.title: Anthropic is bringing Claude Cowork to mobile and web
item.description: Anthropic expands Claude Cowork to mobile and web, allowing tasks to run and continue across devices.

item.title: I built 5 Gemini Gems that stop me repeating myself to AI — here’s how to make them
item.description: Gemini Gems let you create reusable AI assistants for the tasks you do again and again — here are five of my favorites and how to build them yourself.

item.title: Australias kid social media ban is ineffective, study suggests
item.description: A study has found that platforms aren't clearing the first test for Australia's social media ban for children under 16.

item.title: Nothing Ear (3a) earbuds have dropped to under $100 — what’s new and how to buy
item.description: Nothing’s Ear (3a) wireless earbuds launch for $99 with a new design, upgraded features, and the company’s signature transparent style. Here’s everything you need to know.

item.title: Des Steam Machine déjà en panne ? Pourquoi la « Red Line of Death » n’est finalement si grave
item.description: Les premières Steam Machine qui rendent l'âme au bout de quelques minutes ne sont pas victimes d'un défaut matériel. La cause est logicielle, et elle se corrige heureusement.

item.title: Samsung brade ses meilleures références durant les soldes d’été : les 8 deals à retenir
item.description: Les soldes d’été battent leur plein : il est encore temps de faire de superbes affaires ! Pour cet événement incontournable, Samsung décide de frapper fort en cassant le prix de très nombreuses références de son catalogue. Smartphones, montres connectées ou même PC portables : le géant coréen brade tout son écosystème pour notre plus grand plaisir. ...

item.title: PlayStation sort du silence et ça ne se passe pas très bien
item.description: Alors que la colère des joueurs ne retombe pas après l'annonce de la fin des disques physiques, PlayStation a choisi de reprendre la parole ce mardi 7 juillet… pour vanter sa nouvelle manette de combat FlexStrike. Un timing qui n'a fait qu'attiser la fronde.

item.title: Streaming deal: This code unlocks ad-free Paramount+ for less than a dollar
item.description: Paramount+ Premium has another great streaming deal. Use this code to unlock two months of ad-free Premium for 99 cents per month.

item.title: Our Summer Game Fest 2026 quiz will prove whether you watched the show closely or not
item.description: Remember all the big reveals at Summer Game Fest 2026? Test yourself with our quiz.

item.title: 'No way THIS is the first tweet PlayStation puts out after 6 days' — Instead of responding to the physical disc controversy, PlayStation is trying to advertise its new fight stick as fans refuse to back down
item.description: Sony is trying to advertise its new PlayStation fight stick amid physical disc controversy, but fans aren't having it.

item.title: Vous partez en vacances en voiture électrique ? Racontez-nous comment vous préparez vos trajets
item.description: Le grand départ des vacances approche et cette année s'annonce différente pour vous. C'en est fini avec le plein d'essence, vous venez d'acheter une voiture électrique, que vous inaugurez avec un long premier voyage estival. Excité ou stressé de gérer une batterie ? Racontez-nous, et qui sait, d'autres lecteurs vont pouvoir vous donner quelques conseils pratiques juste avant de prendre la route. ...

item.title: EA College Football 27: Road to Glory review
item.description: CFB 27's gameplay still shines, but Road to Glory stumbles again with clunky AI and a half-baked high school mode.

item.title: Steam Machine users are reporting 'red line of death' issues, but there's now an official fix - and it's surprisingly easy
item.description: Find out what you need to do if your Steam Machine is displaying a worrying red indicator light.

item.title: Here's what all of those Android status bar icons mean
item.description: There's a lot of info packed in the top area of an Android phone's screen

item.title: Trump Accounts is a good idea with a bad brand
item.description: The new program, which gives American children $1,000 in a savings account, could benefit from a less partisan name. President Donald Trump’s name has never less popular as a baby name than it is now, but he’s naming the next generation’s new savings accounts after himself anyway.

item.title: Réseaux sociaux interdits avant 15 ans : la France doit revoir sa copie, la rentrée compromise
item.description: La France voulait être pionnière sur les réseaux sociaux pour mineurs. Elle l'était, en fait, depuis juillet 2023. Sauf que cette loi n'a jamais été appliquée. Et la nouvelle version vient d'être retoquée par Bruxelles.

item.title: Philips unveils the MegaBasket, and it's big enough to air fry an antelope: with massive capacity it's made for mega meals
item.description: Philips' new MegaBasket air fryer combines steam, air frying and huge cooking capacity.

item.title: Soldes d’été : Xiaomi casse les prix sur un tas de produits incontournables
item.description: S'il y a bien un constructeur incontournable pour faire de bonnes affaires pendant les soldes d’été, c'est Xiaomi. Réputée pour son rapport qualité-prix imbattable, la marque voit une grande partie de son catalogue en promotion. Découvrez notre guide des meilleures offres.

item.title: I'm an office furniture expert and this is the budget office chair and standing desk combo I'd buy with my own money — if you're upgrading your WFH or study space, I don't think you can beat this Sihoo and FlexiSpot setup
item.description: The Sihoo B100 and FlexiSpot EN1 hit the sweet spot for features I don't even see on some premium desks and chairs.
